full_content:
Batch formalization: Artifact-oriented development governance as a default GT-KB interpretation stance.

Owner directive:
- The default behavior of the system should be oriented toward artifacts and plans.
- GT-KB should be biased toward capturing deliberations, adding planned work to the standing backlog, treating agreed plans as artifacts, and starting sessions by examining artifact state.
- The AI should impose this view of a development project so user inputs can trigger clear CRUD decisions for project artifacts.
- The purpose is to lose less knowledge and memory from session to session.
- The owner approved adding this principle to the system if useful, specifically to encourage bias toward design options and interpretation of user inputs.

Artifacts to create:
- DELIB-0874: owner decision establishing artifact-oriented development governance.
- GOV-ARTIFACT-ORIENTED-GOVERNANCE-001: governance principle that GT-KB interprets concrete project input through artifact lifecycle opportunities by default.
- ADR-ARTIFACT-ORIENTED-DEVELOPMENT-001: architecture decision to model project memory as a durable artifact graph rather than transient conversation.
- DCL-ARTIFACT-LIFECYCLE-TRIGGERS-001: design constraint requiring artifact lifecycle trigger classification, capture thresholds, explicit lifecycle states, and non-intrusive confirmation flows.

Implementation hooks in this change:
- Add a cross-cutting directive to CODEX-STANDING-PRIORITIES.md so future sessions load the principle at startup.
- Add a standing backlog completion record and regression visibility.
- Add regression tests that verify MemBase records and the startup-loaded directive exist.

Thresholds and limits:
- Not every thought becomes an artifact.
- Brainstorming stays lightweight until it becomes a decision, plan, requirement, risk, procedure, review finding, or accepted future work.
- Formal artifact mutations still require the applicable approval gate.
- The system should propose or capture candidates non-intrusively and avoid interrupting concrete work unnecessarily.
explicit_change_request: Owner stated that default system behavior should be oriented toward artifacts and plans, then said: If there is a useful way to add this to the system, in order to encourage bias toward design options and interpretation of user inputs, please do so.
change_reason: Formalize artifact-oriented development governance as a default interpretation stance.
